title: Part 7 – Compréhension écrite : e-mail professionnel
instructions: Lisez l'e-mail, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
From: Sophie Martin, Operations Manager
To: All Department Heads
Subject: New Expense Reporting System

Dear colleagues,

Starting next month, our company will switch to a new online expense reporting system called QuickClaim. All expense reports must be submitted through this platform instead of the paper forms we currently use.

To help with the transition, the IT department will hold training sessions every Tuesday and Thursday afternoon during the first two weeks of next month. Attendance is optional but strongly recommended, especially for employees who frequently travel for work.

Please note that any paper expense forms submitted after the end of this month will not be processed. If you have questions about the new system, contact the IT helpdesk at extension 204.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sophie Martin
Operations Manager

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of the email?
choices: To announce a new expense reporting system
questions.explanation: L'e-mail annonce le passage à un nouveau système de notes de frais, QuickClaim.

questions.prompt: When will the training sessions take place?
choices: During the last week of the month
questions.explanation: Le texte précise : "every Tuesday and Thursday afternoon during the first two weeks of next month".

questions.prompt: What will happen to paper expense forms submitted after the end of the month?
choices: They will be processed as usual
They will be sent to the IT department
They will be forwarded to Sophie Martin
questions.explanation: Le texte indique : "any paper expense forms submitted after the end of this month will not be processed".

questions.prompt: Who should employees contact with questions about the system?
questions.explanation: Le texte indique : "contact the IT helpdesk at extension 204".
